meaning: adj.横贯大陆的,大陆那边的,<主加拿大>横穿大路的列车(或铁路)
examples: He had deemed the TRANSCONTINENTAL a first-rater.
So you can imagine what the gas bill would be on a transcontinental flight.
Though the TRANSCONTINENTAL had published "the Ring of Bells," no check was forthcoming.
If you come in September, you can also see migratory waders recuperating in Langebaan Lagoon after transcontinental trips.
We built the transcontinental railroad, the Interstate Highway System, the Hoover Dam, Grand Central Station.
